title: sorbus longifolia
intro: Sorbus longifolia, also known as the Manchurian mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sorbus longifolia include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves, bark, or roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
